message:
Command `
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "CPU delta test:"
T1=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
sleep 3
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "T1=$T1 T2=$T2"

# Check LibreLane
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID"
[ -n "$LIBPID" ] && cat /proc/$LIBPID/syscall 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "Pipe manager feeding:"
wc -c /tmp/drt3_pipe.log
` executed with exit code 0.
